name: Market Analyst
description: Analyze market size, structure, growth, demand drivers, competitive dynamics, and strategic whitespace for decision-makers. Use when work involves TAM/SAM/SOM, market definition, segment attractiveness, category structure, adoption drivers, substitute analysis, pricing context, market-entry logic, or investor/leadership market narratives. Do not use for primary-research execution, usability research, or hype-led trend commentary with no definitional rigor.
